name: Uriel
description: A Hebrew name meaning God is my light, used in Jewish tradition and later associated with an archangel in some texts.

name: Ulysses
description: Latin form of Odysseus, a classical name with debated meaning and strong literary and mythological associations.

name: Ursula
description: Ursula derives from Latin ursa meaning bear with a diminutive sense, and it is historically reinforced by Christian saint traditions.

name: Ulises
description: The Spanish form of Ulysses, ultimately linked to Odysseus, it reflects classical reception in Hispanic naming traditions.

name: Uriah
description: A biblical Hebrew name, it appears in the Hebrew Bible and is typically interpreted as referring to divine light or flame.

name: Una
description: Used in Irish and literary contexts, it is commonly interpreted as one, conveying singularity and uniqueness in a compact form.

name: Unique
description: Modern English word-name taken directly from the adjective unique, signaling singularity and individuality in contemporary naming practices.

name: Urijah
description: Urijah is a variant of Uriah, a biblical Hebrew name expressing divine light and longstanding scriptural associations.

name: Urban
description: Latin name borne by several popes, historically conveying association with civic life and urban identity.

name: Umar
description: Umar is a prominent Arabic name historically borne by early Islamic figures and interpreted with meanings of life and flourishing.

name: Uziel
description: Uziel is a Hebrew theophoric name meaning God is my strength, known from biblical genealogies and later Jewish usage.

name: Ubaldo
description: Ubaldo reflects Germanic elements for boldness and help, transmitted through Italian usage and the cult of Saint Ubaldo.

name: Uma
description: Uma is a Sanskrit name associated with Hindu tradition, including usage as an epithet linked to divine and luminous qualities.

name: Usman
description: Arabic name historically linked to a bird term, widely known through early Islamic history and used across Muslim communities.

name: Ula
description: Used as a short form in several European languages, including Scandinavian and Polish contexts, with meanings dependent on source name.

name: Ulices
description: Ulices is the Spanish form of Ulysses, a classical name linked to Odysseus traditions in Greco-Roman literature.

name: Ulyses

name: Ulisses

name: Usher

name: Uri
description: A Hebrew biblical name, it is typically interpreted as light or flame and remains common in Jewish naming practice.

name: Uzziah
description: A biblical theophoric name borne by figures in Hebrew texts, emphasizing divine strength and protection.

name: Umberto
description: Umberto is the Italian form of a Germanic name traditionally interpreted as bright or famous warrior.

description: Modern English word-name taken directly from the adjective unique, signaling singularity and individuality in contemporary naming practices.

name: Uriah
description: A biblical Hebrew name, it appears in the Hebrew Bible and is typically interpreted as referring to divine light or flame.

name: Unity
description: English virtue name derived from an abstract noun, used to signal ideals of concord and social cohesion.

name: Urbano
description: Urbano is a Spanish and Italian form of Urbanus, associated with cities and borne by several historical saints.

name: Uzziel
description: Hebrew biblical name interpreted as God is my strength, appearing in scriptural genealogies and later religious naming.

name: Uvaldo
description: Uvaldo is a Spanish form related to Oswald-type names, historically interpreted as a powerful or ruling figure.

name: Uzair
description: An Arabic name associated with Uzayr in Islamic tradition, used widely with transliteration variants across regions.

name: Ulani

name: Umair

name: Undra
description: Uncommon name possibly influenced by Indra-like phonology, though reliable etymological documentation remains limited.

name: Ulric
description: A Germanic name from elements for wolf and ruler, attested in medieval Europe and revived in modern usage.

name: Ulysee
description: Ulysee is a French-styled form of Ulysses, referencing the classical hero and Greek-rooted name tradition.

name: Udell

name: Uniqua

name: Ulrich
description: Ulrich is a traditional Germanic name formed from elements denoting heritage or prosperity and rulership, common in medieval records.

name: Uriyah

name: Ulysess

name: Uchenna

name: Uyen
description: A Vietnamese given name, it is associated with gentleness and grace and is used widely in Vietnam and diaspora communities.

name: Utah

name: Umer

name: Urvi

name: Urias

name: Uriel

name: Unice

name: Urian

name: Uziah

name: Usiel
description: A Hebrew theophoric name, sometimes associated with angelic naming traditions in later interpretive sources.

name: Umaiza

name: Ulis

name: Ulysse

name: Uday

name: Ulyssa

name: Uriyah

name: Ulonda

name: Usama

name: Umi

name: Uzma

name: Usha

name: Ulyess

name: Undray

name: Uno

name: Ulas

name: Undine

name: Umaima

name: Ursala

name: Uliana

name: Usbaldo

name: Umme
